name: Compare workers comp vs suing in Idaho construction case?
description: Comp easy/limited; suit max but harder.[2]

mainEntity.name: Compare workers comp vs suing in Idaho construction case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp easy/limited; suit max but harder.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Comp quicker no-proof, limited payout; suits higher but prove fault.** Idaho comp exclusive vs employer.[2] Key factors: (1) Comp: medicals/2/3 wages; (2) Suit: pain/future/full vs third; (3) 2-yr limit; (4) both often.[2][7] File comp first, sue if others liable. Lawyer advises best path.
